predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a small company.

predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has the background status of possessing legal personality.

predicates.name: is_subsidiary_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a subsidiary company.

predicates.name: is_parent_company
predicates.description: The company has the background status of being a parent company.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The financial year is the company's last closed financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee threshold for the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the net turnover threshold for the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold for the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the listed criteria for the financial year.

predicates.name: is_micro_company
predicates.description: The company is legally classified as a micro-company for the relevant financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover excluding value added tax of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.
